title: Ooze Weaver negates Atk damage for 10 self damage

card.rawText: When a magic card is played or this card would receive Atk damage, choose 1 of the following: Take 15 damage to negate the magic card. Take 10 damage to negate the Atk damage. This creature is unaffected by magic cards.

effect.value: When a magic card is played or this card would receive Atk damage, choose 1 of the following: Take 15 damage to negate the magic card. Take 10 damage to negate the Atk damage. This creature is unaffected by magic cards.

plan.title: Ooze Weaver negates Atk damage for 10 self damage
plan.summary: Battle into Ooze Weaver and verify the choice-based Atk damage prevention route is represented.

notes: Read text first: When a magic card is played or this card would receive Atk damage, choose 1 of the following: Take 15 damage to negate the magic card. Take 10 damage to negate the Atk damage. This creature is unaffected by magic cards.

expectedAssertions.label: Ooze Weaver pays 10 self damage to prevent attack damage

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Battle into Ooze Weaver and verify the choice-based Atk damage prevention route is represented.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
